questions.question: A dot pattern follows the rule n² + n. Find the number of dots in the 10th figure.
A line pattern has values 5, 9, 13, 17, ... Find the number of lines in the 25th figure.
The number of dots in a pattern is given by the rule 2n² + 1. Find the number of dots in the 8th figure.
A pattern of dots increases as 6, 12, 20, 30, ... Determine the number of dots in the 10th figure.
In a triangular dot pattern, the number of dots in the nth figure is given by n(n+1)/2. Find the number of dots in the 12th figure.
If a pattern of lines follows the rule 4n + 3, determine the number of lines in the 30th figure.
A square dot pattern increases according to (n + 2)². How many dots are in the 9th figure?
The number of dots in a pattern follows 3n² − 2n. Find the number of dots in the 7th figure.
A dot pattern follows the sequence 4, 10, 18, 28, ... Find the algebraic rule for the nth figure.
If the number of lines in a pattern increases by 7 each step starting from 6, find the number of lines in the 40th figure.
Find the number of dots in the 15th triangular pattern.
A pattern follows the rule n² + 2n + 3. Find the number of dots in the 11th figure.
A line pattern is given by the rule 5n − 2. Find the number of lines in the 50th figure.
The sequence of dots follows 2, 6, 12, 20, 30, ... Determine the rule and find the number of dots in the 12th figure.
If the rule for a dot pattern is n(2n + 1), how many dots appear in the 9th figure?
A pattern of lines follows the rule 3n² + 2. Find the number of lines in the 6th figure.
In a square dot pattern with n² dots, how many dots are added when moving from the 14th figure to the 15th figure?
A triangular pattern grows such that each new figure adds one more dot than the previous addition. Find the number of dots in the 20th figure.
Find the nth term for the dot pattern 7, 13, 21, 31, ...
A pattern of dots is given by n² + 4n. Find the number of dots in the 13th figure.
If the rule for a line pattern is 2n² + 3n, find the number of lines in the 8th figure.
A dot pattern is defined by (n + 1)(n + 2). Find the number of dots in the 9th figure.
Find the number of dots in the 25th triangular number.
If the pattern rule is 3n² + 4n + 1, determine the number of dots in the 10th figure.
A dot pattern follows the rule n² + 5n + 6. Find the number of dots in the 12th figure.
